title: The Mystery of the Missing Picasso

segments.text: In 1977, a priceless Picasso painting vanished without a trace.
The painting, 'Portrait of a Woman,' was stolen from a hotel.
It was last seen hanging in the lobby during a luxury event.
Despite security footage, no one was ever charged.
The case remains open, with theories swirling around the art world.
A masterpiece lost to time, leaving questions in its wake.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: A priceless Picasso vanished from a hotel in 1977 and remains missing. Follow for daily cold cases!
